description_long: This modern bungalow features a flat, multi-tiered roof and a clean, rectilinear design with large horizontal windows and a mix of white and brown exterior finishes. The structure is surrounded by a manicured hedge and a low fence, with a paved walkway leading to the main entrance. The rear of the bungalow boasts a private outdoor area with a swimming pool, wooden deck, and shaded seating area, complemented by a small tree and garden landscaping. The building's facade is punctuated by wide glass panels, providing ample natural light to the interior. The upper story is set back, creating a terrace space with outdoor furniture. The overall design emphasizes open, functional outdoor living spaces and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor environments.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large windows, a private pool, and landscaped outdoor areas, surrounded by a hedge and low fence. The design features clean lines, open terraces, and a mix of white and brown finishes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, symmetrical window arrangement, and landscaped walkway bordered by a hedge and low fence.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the pool area, wooden deck, shaded seating, and the setback upper story with terrace.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full pool, outdoor lounge, garden landscaping, and the multi-level roof structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the tiered facade, window placements, and the continuation of the hedge and fence.
